title: canarium rigidum
intro: Canarium rigidum, also known as the New Caledonian canarium, is a species of evergreen tree in the family Sapindaceae, native to New Caledonia. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly its seeds, which contain a rich source of oil with potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The seeds of Canarium rigidum are also reported to have various health benefits, including reducing cholesterol levels and aiding in the management of hypertension. The plant's seeds can be prepared into herbal preparations such as oil, which can be used to treat various ailments, and also as a dietary supplement to promote overall health.
